language.name: Language
language.description: Select the display language for the calendar

monthFormat.name: Month format
monthFormat.description: Select how months are displayed in the calendar header

titleFormat.name: Title format
titleFormat.description: Select the order of year and month in the calendar header

weekStart.name: Week start
weekStart.description: Select the first day of the week

ignoredFolders.name: Ignored folders
ignoredFolders.description: Set folder paths to ignore. Notes in these folders will not be counted

dateFieldName.name: Date field name
dateFieldName.description: The YAML frontmatter field name to use for date statistics (e.g., created, date, published)

dateSource.name: Date source
dateSource.description: Select the source for note date statistics

filenameDateFormat.name: Filename date format
filenameDateFormat.description: The format pattern to extract date from filename (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD, YYYYMMDD, YYYY/MM/DD)

displayMode.name: Display mode
displayMode.description: Choose how to display note statistics on the calendar

statisticsType.name: Statistics type
statisticsType.description: Choose whether to count by note quantity or total word count

dotThreshold.name: Notes per dot
dotThreshold.description: Number of notes represented by each dot (1-10)

dotWordThreshold.name: Words per dot
dotWordThreshold.description: Number of words represented by each dot (minimum 1)

heatmapMaxNotes.name: Max notes for heatmap
heatmapMaxNotes.description: Maximum note count to reach full brightness in heatmap mode. Any date with notes >= this value will show maximum brightness.

heatmapMaxWords.name: Max words for heatmap
heatmapMaxWords.description: Maximum word count to reach full brightness in heatmap mode. Any date with words >= this value will show maximum brightness. (minimum 1)

heatmapHideDateNumbers.name: Hide date numbers
heatmapHideDateNumbers.description: Hide date numbers in heatmap mode, show only color blocks

confirmBeforeCreate.name: Confirm before creating
confirmBeforeCreate.description: Show a confirmation dialog before creating a daily note when left-clicking a date

showWeekNumber.name: Show week numbers
showWeekNumber.description: Display week numbers on the left side of the calendar

openCalendar.name: Open calendar view
openCalendar.description: Display the calendar view in the right sidebar

refreshPlugin.name: Refresh plugin
refreshPlugin.description: Refresh the calendar view to apply latest settings

weekNoteEnabled.name: Enable weekly note
weekNoteEnabled.description: Create or open weekly note when clicking week number

weekNoteTemplate.name: Weekly note template
weekNoteTemplate.description: Path to weekly note template file (leave empty for default style)

weekNoteFolder.name: Weekly note folder
weekNoteFolder.description: Folder path for weekly notes (leave empty for root directory)

weekNoteFormat.name: Weekly note naming format
weekNoteFormat.description: Use YYYY for year, WW for week number. Content in [] brackets will be displayed as-is. Example: YYYY-[W]WW produces 2024-W01.md

monthNoteEnabled.name: Enable monthly note
monthNoteEnabled.description: Create or open monthly note when clicking the month header

monthNoteTemplate.name: Monthly note template
monthNoteTemplate.description: Path to monthly note template file (leave empty for default style)

monthNoteFolder.name: Monthly note folder
monthNoteFolder.description: Folder path for monthly notes (leave empty for root directory)

monthNoteFormat.name: Monthly note naming format
monthNoteFormat.description: Use YYYY for year, MM for month. Content in [] brackets will be displayed as-is. Example: YYYY-MM produces 2024-01.md

yearNoteEnabled.name: Enable yearly note
yearNoteEnabled.description: Create or open yearly note when clicking the year header

yearNoteTemplate.name: Yearly note template
yearNoteTemplate.description: Path to yearly note template file (leave empty for default style)

yearNoteFolder.name: Yearly note folder
yearNoteFolder.description: Folder path for yearly notes (leave empty for root directory)

yearNoteFormat.name: Yearly note naming format
yearNoteFormat.description: Use YYYY for year. Content in [] brackets will be displayed as-is. Example: YYYY produces 2024.md

hideCompletedTodos.name: Hide completed todo dots
hideCompletedTodos.description: Do not show todo status dots when all todo items are completed

notifications.dailyNotesNotEnabled: Please enable the Daily Notes core plugin first
notifications.dailyNotesCreateFailed: Failed to create daily note, please check the daily notes plugin settings
